parameters.subject: =Task Due Reminder (24 Hours): {{$json.task_title}}
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}},

This is a reminder that the task {{$json.task_title}} is due within the next 24 hours.

Task Schedule

Task Title {{$json.task_title}}
Assigned To {{$json.task_owner_firstname}} {{$json.task_owner_lastname}}
Task Created On {{$json.task_created_at}}
Task End / Due Date {{$json.task_due_date}}
Current Status {{$json.task_status}}
Milestone {{$json.milestone_title || 'N/A'}}
Project {{$json.project_title}}
Task URL View Task

Please prioritize completion or update the task with revised timelines if required.

Regards,
Task Management System

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id                    AS task_id,
  t.title                 AS task_title,
  CONVERT_TZ(t.created_at, '+00:00', '+05:30')            AS task_created_at,
  t.target_date           AS task_due_date,
  t.status                AS task_status,
  t.parent_id             AS parent_id,

  -- hours remaining
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    HOUR,
    UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
    t.target_date
  )                       AS hours_remaining,

  -- task owner
  rp.email                AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname            AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname             AS task_owner_lastname,

  -- milestone info
  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title,

  -- project info
  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  -- observers (aggregated)
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.id) AS observer_ids,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.firstname) AS observer_first_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.lastname) AS observer_last_names,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT obs.email) AS observer_emails

FROM task_managements t

-- task owner
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- milestone (optional)
LEFT JOIN milestones m
  ON m.id = t.milestone_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

-- observers
LEFT JOIN task_users tu
  ON tu.task_id = t.id
  AND tu.user_type = 'observer'
  AND tu.active = 1

LEFT JOIN spree_users obs
  ON obs.id = tu.user_id

WHERE
  t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')
  AND t.target_date > UTC_TIMESTAMP()                     -- not overdue
  AND t.target_date <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 40 HOUR
  AND t.parent_id IS NULL

GROUP BY t.id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
